title: Cobblemon Hunter
description: A Datapack for the Cobblemon Mod which adds Monsters from the game franchise; Monster Hunter
body:
# Cobblemon Hunter!

Cobblemon Hunter is a Datapack for Cobblemon which adds monsters from the Monster Hunter franchise! So if you ever wanted to befriend your favourite monsters as pokémon then this is the datapack for you!

## Installation:

To add to your cobblemon world, put the zip file into your worlds datapack folder. Once you have the datapack installed, make sure you also put the zip into your resource pack folder so all the monsters have their models! 

# Releases!:

## Initial Release:
- **Whelp**, Poison, Abilities: Toxic Debris, Gooey, H/Poison Point
- **Khezu**, Poison/Electric, Abilities: Toxic Debris, Electromorphosis, H/Levitate
- |
- **Rathling**, Fire/Flying, Abilities: Blaze, H/intimidate
- **Rathian**, Fire/Poison, Abilities: Levitate, H/intimidate
- **Rathalos**, Fire/Flying, Abilities: Blaze, H/intimidate
- |
- **Malfestio**, Dark/Psychic, Abilities: Compound Eyes, Steadfast, H/Clear Body
## Brute Update:
- **Palico**, Normal, Abilities: Pickup, Battlearmor, H/rattled
- |
- **Brachydios**, Fighting, Abilities: Vital Spirit, Gooey, H/Multiscale
- |
- **Deviljho**, Dragon/Dark, Abilities: Dragons Maw, Guts, H/Huge Power
- |
- **Duramboros**, Grass/Ground, Abilities: Overgrow, H/Grassy Surge
- |
- **Uragaan**, Rock/Fire, Abilities: Contrary, Stench, H/Effect Spore

Monster Hunter Generations Ultimate final boss spoiler:

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Good Boi Update:

- **Zinogre**, Electric, Abilities: Electric Surge, H/Electromorphosis
- |
- **Odogaron**, Dark/Fighting, Abilities: Guard Dog, Guts, H/Scrappy
- |
- **Lunagaron**, Dark/Ice, Abilities: Weak Armor, Guts, H/Unnerve
- |
- **Palamute**, Normal, Abilities: Guard Dog, H/Battle Bond
- |
- **Chameleos**, Poison, Abilities: Color Change
- |
- **Rachnoid**, Bug/Fire, Abilities: Flash Fire, H/Flower Gift
- **Rakna-Kadaki**, Bug/Fire, Abilities: Flash Fire, H/Flower Gift
- **Nerscylla**, Bug/Poison, Abilities: Corrosion, H/Weak Armor
- |
- **Gypceros**, Poison/Fairy, Abilities: Prankster, H/Poison Heal
- |
- **Tetsy**, Rock, Abilities: Rockhead, Sturdy, H/Rocky Payload
- **Tetsucabra**, Rock, Abilities: Rockhead, Sturdy, H/Rocky Payload
- |
- **Gigginox**, Poison, Abilities: Toxic Debris, Gooey, H/Poison Point
- |
- **Bazelgeuse**, Flying/Fire, Abilities: Flare Boost, Bullet Proof, H/Mirror Armor

# Upcoming Plans!:

## Return to Monkey Update 1.3
## Fated Four Update 1.4
## Evolve to Crab Update 1.5

**Want to stay up to date on new monster reveals? Go to the Cobblemon Discord and search Cobblemon  Hunter in the addon-content channel, and follow it to get notified whenever something is posted!**
